steps.title: Explain why blue persists
steps.content: Male jacobins prefer green females as mates, yet many adult females remain blue. The passage also says males are less antagonistic toward blue females during resource competition, suggesting an advantage unrelated to mate attraction.

steps.title: Reject unsupported predictions
steps.content: Choice A predicts a future increase the passage does not support. Choice C introduces green females' perception, which is not discussed. Choice D shifts to juveniles rather than adult blue females. The hypothesis should point to a nonmating factor. The answer is B.
